legal_actions.notes: This action supports classification_criteria_triggered and classification_datetime_utc.
legal_actions.operational_purpose: Determines whether the incident reaches the major ICT-related incident threshold and triggers the initial-notification workflow.
legal_actions.review_note: Classification is modelled as a procedural precondition, not as a submission duty.

legal_actions.notes: This action supports general information and initial-notification profile fields.
legal_actions.operational_purpose: Collects and structures the information expected for the initial notification.
legal_actions.review_note: Preparation is separated from submission so fields can map to content requirements independently from the time-limit duty.

legal_actions.notes: This action supports competent_authority, classification/detection timestamps and the submission time window.
legal_actions.operational_purpose: Represents the time-bound initial-notification submission act.
legal_actions.review_note: The profile models the initial notification only; intermediate and final reports are outside this action.

legal_actions.notes: This is not modelled as a required initial-notification content duty.
legal_actions.operational_purpose: Captures the possibility that a third-party provider reports on behalf of the financial entity.
legal_actions.review_note: Used only for optional third-party provider and outsourcing-reference fields.

legal_actions.notes: Downstream non-claims should state that DORA notification does not replace NIS2 or GDPR notification duties.
legal_actions.operational_purpose: Allows the profile to carry optional references to related threat, NIS2 or GDPR notifications.
legal_actions.review_note: This is an operational support action, not a DORA content requirement.

non_claims: These actions are a lightweight operational decomposition, not LegalRuleML and not legal advice.
The action model does not decide whether a real incident is major.
The action model does not prove that a notification was submitted or accepted.
The action model is reviewable and may be challenged or refined.
title: Human-authored DORA legal actions for initial notification
